summary:
The recommended vaccinations include Polio vaccine series with both oral poliovirus (OPV) and injectable IPV; DTP-Hib-Polio combination or similar hexavalent/pentavalent vaccine which includes DTaP along with Hib and possibly Pneumococcus if not already given earlier; HepB completed per usual protocol by this stage but ensuring no gaps from previous visits; finally planning a varicella vaccination around next visit when appropriate based upon current guidelines since it is typically administered between ages 12-15 months initially followed again later depending local schedules.

---
